{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232013249C1EF50C67AAE27575F5"}"},"total":1838},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7543771058751423257","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本书确实不错，切入视角很独特，处理事情的方法是很多其他四合院书不会想的，不是一味的算计，特别是一边说别人算计，一边自己算计别人，这本书以一个正常人的视角去处理碰到的问题，人情世故是真的人情世故，而不是事故，加油，如果后面没有其他爆雷，值得一看！！！！！！","text_exts":[{"e":30,"s":27,"text":"四合院","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774268004E27575F5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227543771058751423257%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227531031466633874457%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756425315,"group_id":"7531031466633874457","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5bjhXJfEe4KEzzzVZBqazmGnhUw2RJwLoxFruwdWXHy","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1050778716091140","user_name":"仌心"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1050778716091140","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7531031466633874457","book_info":{"abstract":"【中低戾气】【爆改傻柱/雨水】【重塑家风】
穿越成《情满四合院》里傻柱那“早死”的大哥！
战场退下来之后爆改弟妹
面对被全院吸血还当舔狗条的弟弟何雨柱？何卫国就一个字：揍！ 揍到清醒！
面对从小受尽委屈、瘦成豆芽菜的妹妹何雨水？
何卫国化身守护神：宠！ 吃饱穿暖，撑腰到底，谁敢欺负往死里削！
爆改弟妹计划启动：傻柱，皮痒了你就吱声！
雨水，有哥在，天塌了哥扛！
看铁血大哥如何在禽满四合院，用“铁拳”和“暖阳”，硬核重塑何家门风！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/35050bd2353fe8c9ec7f4623bf04963c","author":"留半截烟头","author_id":"","book_id":"7531031466633874457","book_name":"傻柱：雨水救我！大哥要打死我！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":495,"name":"四合院","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=495&name=四合院&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7531031515363279385","read_count":"95251","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1018464"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"450","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,四合院,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2af28f114b3147b54f9a8d14a6d6c2ca~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779452004&x-signature=izRhulz2S7tEbZ0fGvkkCir%2BA5s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2510936787651262","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"235"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232013249C1EF50C67AAE27575F5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读18小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":27847,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":64068,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":42728},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7557406425596314392","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很好，剧情上不落俗套，有新意，节奏把握也不错，张弛有度。如果能保持这样的写作水平，可以说它将成为一部不错的书。虽然细节上有一些小瑕疵，但看的时候无伤大雅。整体水平优良，是一部值得推荐的书。也希望作者能继续保持，在保证质量的前提下能提高一下更新速度。当然我更希望质量优先。作者快更，要在我明年高考前更完！！！（自己也是家里长兄，所以这本书真是写进我心坎儿里了。[笑][笑][笑]）","text_exts":[{"e":27,"s":25,"text":"张弛","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BC%A0%E5%BC%9B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774268004E27575F5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227557406425596314392%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227531031466633874457%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BC%A0%E5%BC%9B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759599686,"group_id":"7531031466633874457","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢安静，也享受孤独，偶而发疯，偶而发呆，也会任性与冲动","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4dRYuc9OP+1kawybHjsEHBBxX3dZ8eFJxsEDIMTftqG","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b15a1fd904434a0cbae98cf74fe805f3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796672&x-signature=r4L6DN2A%2B8mktp9nD6PX9bwyDnA%3D","user_id":"1834427988061758","user_name":"苛施"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1834427988061758","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7531031466633874457","book_info":{"abstract":"【中低戾气】【爆改傻柱/雨水】【重塑家风】

orwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":28243,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":20629},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7561860711127925528","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常不错，相对于之前看的几本四合院的小说，非常的干脆利落，看得非常的爽，本来原著就各种憋屈的了，那些同人小说还在那里揪着那些憋屈事各种来回，各种纠结，各种小心翼翼，各种算计，看得各种窝心，比原著也好不到哪里去（当然看小说各有各的喜好吧，可能有人就是喜欢看这种的，我就比较看不来），这本小说就处理得非常好，遇到的所有针对欺负欺压，就直接打，打到你服为止，傻柱和秦寡妇之间的事处理得非常的干脆利落，主角和家人的感情也写得非常自然细腻；就我个人觉得，就目前来说，这是我看过的最好最喜欢的四合院同人小说","text_exts":[{"e":17,"s":14,"text":"四合院","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774268004E27575F5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227561860711127925528%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227531031466633874457%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760635430,"group_id":"7531031466633874457","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/20qOON0ZodkP+bI3Gd4SaxvbzXSv741AW48VuMI7bd","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d7dc8754ec4a4ddd8d99d9b92e2c6063~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789215&x-signature=PSp1sHrw%2F8e2QvSub3iDQKbth2Q%3D","user_id":"3368493256289415","user_name":"大老师"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3368493256289415","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":f
